violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler fan and shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026
The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety licensed with RIDOH. Applications provided at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The non-food contact of the drive-thru beverage cooler shelf has an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/12/2025
The customer restroom was lacking toilet tissue. Staff refilled during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/29/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
Utensils and a single use cup lid were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was in excess of 400 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC drained and refilled sanitizer bay to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

Crates of milk were observed stored under walk-in condenser, with condensation dripping onto containers. Milk crates were moved during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
Utensils (drink stirrers) were observed on an uncleaned surface between uses. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The walk-in cooler was not in good repair. Inspector observed fans inoperable during inspection with ambient temperature increasing to 50 degrees during inspection. Per general manager, service has been contacted and expected later in the day. All foods moved to freezer during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit has an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/05/2024

The floors and shelving throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2024
The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by trash cans. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

Milk was observed held at (44-46) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
Milk products were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the: 1.shelves throughout the establishment 2.surfaces under counter top equipment 3.bakery rolling racks have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

The: 1.floors in the walk in cooler 2.floors throughout the establishment 3.floors under the all equipment has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023
